claim_boundary: This is an exact equatorial geometry and conditional boundary/localization reduction. It does not identify observed spacetime, physical gauge groups or charges, a physical fermion equation, magnetic monopoles, measured couplings, an absolute unit, or full BHSM.

map.gauge: M5 exact; M4 localization coefficient required
map.gravity: formal bulk profile coefficient; independent M4 EH source required
map.scalar_kinetic: homogeneous bulk zero-mode exact; inhomogeneous M4 localization required
map.scale_RG: a-dependent normalization is not RG running
map.sigma: bulk even zero mode; v5 boundary role conditional
